object_scope_used: MLB totals — barrel rate x park HR factor component decomposition
key_caveats: park_factor_hr >= 1.10 flags 100% of rows — vacuous threshold
Full formulation = Component A exactly — no interaction present
E01 signal is barrel rate alone, not contact-shape x environment interaction

notes: COMPONENT_DOMINATED. The E01 interaction does not exist. Park HR factor threshold is below the field minimum. The full formulation collapses to barrel rate alone.
